/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/NoobNetwork.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NoobNetwork.dir/src/NNMatrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NoobNetwork.dir/src/data_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NoobNetwork.dir/src/activations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NoobNetwork.dir/src/neural_network.cpp.o -o NoobNetwork  raylib/raylib/libraylib.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
